results.owner_or_reason: ADR-0005 (sABdrZoQdp, 'Minimal standalone wiki — engine + identity mandatory', orvexwiki space — distinct from the orvexstudioarch ADR-0005 runner-governance doc) is explicitly cited by slug as source traceability in bodies/E7-S3.md and bodies/E8-S3.md (breakdown/wiki/plan.json). E7-S3 'covers' A-TENANCY (polymorphic user-or-org tenant + personal->Teams upgrade-pass re-key); E8-S3 'covers' FR-W16/FR-W17/FR-W25 + A-PORTABLE/A-APIBOUNDARY (engine API internal-only, no /docs Swagger, product-family-agnostic endpoints). The ADR's engine+identity-mandatory decision is realized under these concrete requirement ids rather than under the literal ADR-0005 string.
